items.question: How does WellFlow's voice quality compare to other apps?
items.answer: WellFlow uses Murf AI, one of the most advanced text-to-speech platforms available. You get natural, human-like voices in multiple styles and languages — far beyond the robotic voices found in most wellness apps.

items.question: Which languages does WellFlow support?
items.answer: WellFlow currently supports English and Spanish, with more languages on the roadmap. The Murf AI integration enables us to add new languages quickly as demand grows.

items.question: What platforms and apps does WellFlow integrate with?
items.answer: WellFlow integrates with Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, Garmin, Google Calendar, Outlook, Slack, WhatsApp, and more. The WellFlow platform engine handles all sync logic so your wellness data stays connected.

items.question: How does pricing and billing work?
items.answer: We offer a Free tier with core features, a Premium tier with Murf AI voice and advanced sessions, and a Pro tier with the full WellFlow platform. You can pay monthly or annually — annual plans save up to 20%. All paid plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.

items.question: Is my data private and secure?
items.answer: Yes. WellFlow encrypts all personal and health data in transit and at rest. We never sell your data to third parties. You can export or delete your data at any time from your account settings.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can start with the Free tier immediately — no credit card required. Premium and Pro plans include a 14-day free trial so you can experience the full feature set before committing.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings. If you cancel within 30 days of your first paid charge, you'll receive a full refund — no questions asked.

items.question: Which devices is WellFlow compatible with?
items.answer: WellFlow works on iOS (iPhone and iPad), Android, and any modern web browser. It also integrates with Apple Watch, Wear OS, Fitbit, and Garmin wearables for real-time biometric-aware sessions.
